ocd_disguises_thoughts_as_facts_this_qui: OCD disguises thoughts as facts. This quiz helps you recognize when your brain is sending "false alarms."
thoughts_are_just_signals_they_dont_have: Thoughts are just signals. They don't have power unless we assign it to them.
having_a_scary_thought_doesnt_mean_anyth: "Having a scary thought doesn't mean anything is wrong with you. Everyone has them."
the_problem_is_not_the_thought_but_the_i: The problem is not the thought, but the importance we assign to it.
every_time_you_label_an_intrusive_though: Every time you label an intrusive thought as 'just a thought', it loses its power. You're building a stronger, clearer mind.
